description: Deterministic WUCI-CAGE v1 attestation fields. This document defines required fields and does not contain live artifact hashes.

required_fields.witness_bundle_sha256: Optional SHA-256 of deterministic witness archive when present
required_fields.ledger_entry_sha256: Optional SHA-256 of CAGE ledger entry when present
required_fields.runtime_execution_allowed: false except existing self-release fixture tests
required_fields.boundary_statement: WUCI-CAGE v1 verifies artifact legitimacy; it does not claim OS sandbox enforcement.
